headline: PNC Wealth Management Launches Securities-Based Lending Solution
summary: PNC Wealth Management today unveiled a new Securities-Based Lending (SBL) solution to provide enhanced liquidity and borrowing options for customers of PNC's Premier Client℠ program. For clients with more than $200,000 of assets at PNC Wealth Management, the SBL can be a quick and efficient way for them to access liquidity while remaining invested in the markets. The minimum line of credit that can be established is $100,000.
